title: My UCLA chancellorship oral history transcript : an utterly candid view
creator: Murphy, Franklin D., 1916-1994

description: Transcript of a 8.25-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program
Murphy discusses his tenure as chancellor, relations with the Academic Senate and University-wide administration, and the institution of new fund-raising sources for campus development
